question: I don't want any tomato slices on my sandwich, they're too wet

history.speaker: client
history.text: I don't want any tomato slices on my sandwich, they're too wet

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Got it, I'll make sure there are no tomato slices on your sandwich. What would you like to order?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I'll have a cheese sandwich, no tomatoes.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: We don't have a cheese sandwich on the menu, but we do have the Bacon Egg Cheese Biscuit (which contains cheese). Would you like that? It doesn't include tomatoes, so it should meet your request!

final_cashier_response: We don't have a cheese sandwich on the menu, but we do have the Bacon Egg Cheese Biscuit (which contains cheese). Would you like that? It doesn't include tomatoes, so it should meet your request!
